backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing planned UI features for the internal dashboard (internal.tsx), including collapsible sub-dashboards, ticket action buttons, Asistenmu client tables, and task management sections with their associated test IDs and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing the purpose and key details of each component, page, utility, and configuration file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes, including sidebar and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Asistenku React SPA, mounting the app at the #root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that configures TanStack Router with two layout groups (PublicLayout and AppLayout) and registers all routes including public pages and dashboard routes for client, partner, and internal users.
frontend/src/components/Closing.tsx: Simple centered closing section displaying a single quality-assurance tagline for the Asistenku service.
frontend/src/components/ConversionStatem: Muted-background section with two centered paragraphs explaining that service unit conversion is handled by Asistenku, not the client.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the Asistenku icon, copyright notice, and navigation links to the Concierge WhatsApp, Internal Login, and Partner Portal.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with the Asistenku logo, desktop navigation (Layanan anchor, Daftar, Masuk), and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Two-column hero section with a bold two-line heading, descriptive paragraphs, a smooth-scroll CTA button, a WhatsApp link button, and a hero image.
frontend/src/components/HowWeSupport.tsx: Muted-background section outlining Asistenku's four-step support process with a closing statement about client-side decision management.
frontend/src/components/JoinTeam.tsx: Centered call-to-action section inviting users to join the Asistenku team with a button linking to the partner information page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Dashboard: A layout shell for dashboard pages that accepts a custom header and children, wrapping them in a full-height flex column with a fixed-width content area and a footer.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCards.tsx: Renders a 2-column accordion grid of four service tier cards (TENANG, RAPI, FOKUS, JAGA), each showing an emoji, title, short description, price, and expandable full description.
frontend/src/components/TimelyDelivery.t: A simple static section component displaying a centered heading and paragraph about timely, parallel task delivery.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder file for future backend query hooks; currently exports nothing.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, and adds utility classes for brand teal and navy colors.
frontend/src/layouts/AppLayout.tsx: A minimal authenticated app layout that renders a full-height flex container with a TanStack Router Outlet as the main content area.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: A public-facing layout that wraps pages with a shared Header and Footer, rendering child routes via a TanStack Router Outlet.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ClientRegister.tsx: A client registration form page with fields for name, email, WhatsApp, and optional company, where all inputs and the submit button are disabled until the user clicks the Internet Identity login button.
frontend/src/pages/dashboard/finance.tsx: Empty finance dashboard page file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/dashboard/internal.ts: Internal admin dashboard page with mock user, ticket, and history data, featuring collapsible sections for user management, support tickets, and activity history with search and filtering.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardClient.tsx: A client dashboard page using DashboardShell that displays active services, task summary counts, and a filterable task list with status-colored badges and a modal for submitting new task requests.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPartner.tsx: Partner dashboard page displaying mock data for a partner's wallet, task summary, and task lists (assigned, in-progress, revision, QA, history) with collapsible sections and filtering controls.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page that composes and renders all main landing page sections including Hero, HowWeSupport, TimelyDelivery, ServiceCards, JoinTeam, and Closing.
frontend/src/pages/InternalPortal.tsx: Internal portal page with Internet Identity login, an internal dashboard entry button, a registration form, and an admin/superadmin claim section, all gated behind login state.
frontend/src/pages/PartnerPortal.tsx: Partner portal page with Internet Identity login, a partner dashboard entry button, and a partner registration form (name, email, WhatsApp, city), all gated behind login state.
frontend/src/pages/TentangPartner.tsx: Informational page describing how Asistenku partners work, including their workflow, level/verification system, transparent work standards, and partner placement criteria.
frontend/src/utils/smoothScroll.ts: Utility function that smoothly scrolls the page to a DOM element by its ID using scrollIntoView.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, shadows, accordion keyframes, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the internal dashboard project (version 3), documenting the five role-based sub-dashboards, existing implemented features, known issues, and planned UI/layout changes such as collapsible sections, progress/resolve modals, and finance GMV enhancements.
